infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FarmtoClick needs your location to track deliveries in real-time.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FarmtoClick needs camera access to take delivery proof photos and upload product images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FarmtoClick needs photo library access to upload product and profile images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FarmtoClick needs your location to track deliveries in real-time.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FarmtoClick needs your location to track deliveries in real-time.

plugins.photosPermission: FarmtoClick needs photo library access to upload product and profile images.
plugins.cameraPermission: FarmtoClick needs camera access to take delivery proof photos and upload product images.
